text:

    sort: Fix random sort

    bwsrawdata() is supposed to return the string buffer.

    PR:             259451
    Reported by:    sigsys@gmail.com
    Fixes:          d053fb22f6d3 ("usr.bin/sort: Avoid UBSan errors")
